_meta.purpose: Daily retention cron observability. The cron walks every tenant's per-category retention windows + platform defaults; a no-show or a row-count spike means the GDPR Art.5(1)(e) storage-limitation control is broken.
_meta.import_to: Datadog Dashboards → New → Import dashboard JSON

title: Uelfy — RETENTION_RUN
description: Daily retention cron health. Expected: 1 event/day @ 03:00 UTC. Missed run ⇒ retention silently halted (GDPR Art.5(1)(e) breach).

monitors._purpose: Missed cron run — Vercel cron can fail silently. We expect 1 event/day; <1 in 28h is a hard failure.
monitors.name: Uelfy — RETENTION_RUN missed
monitors.message:
No RETENTION_RUN event in last 28 hours. The cron should fire daily at 03:00 UTC. SEV-2 — storage-limitation control halted.

Runbook: docs/27-INCIDENT-RESPONSE.md §11.4. Verify Vercel Cron Jobs page; if green there, check function logs for runtime errors.
